reviews.comment:
Tiene un problema y es la velocidad de los que cargan combustible, con dos coches por isla wolo cargan de a uno y se genera una cola impresionante. Con un poco mas de ganas serian 4 estrellas

(Translated by Google)
It has one problem, and that's the speed of the refueling stations. With only two cars per island, they refuel one at a time, creating an enormous queue. With a little more effort, it would be a 4-star station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRc2FTdE5BEAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre lo que tardan en cargar nafta, hay una fila de 4 autos y no avanza nada, hay que ponerles una Shell a unas cuadras para ver así se mueven más.

(Translated by Google)
The time it takes to get gas is a disaster; there's a line of four cars and it's not moving at all. They should put a Shell station a few blocks away to see if they'll move faster.

reviews.comment:
Sabado 9 am y los chicos de los surtidores ponen a cargar un tanque y hasta que no se llena no pasan a otro surtidor!! Se arman filas al pedo, muy poco eficientes

(Translated by Google)
Saturday 9 am and the guys at the pumps are filling one tank and won't move on to another until it's full!! It creates pointless lines, very inefficient.
